name: Paths & Danger
short_description: Embark on an enchanting journey to Paths & Danger, a masterfully crafted procedural turn-based RPG that seamlessly blends simplicity with tactical brilliance. Get ready to be captivated as you assemble a formidable fellowship, where the art of teamwork takes center stage.
detailed_description:
Navigate diverse paths filled with random encounters and unique challenges, making strategic decisions to overcome them.

Recruit and hire new party members, each with distinct skills, to complete your quests. Enhance your adventures by upgrading your characters' gear and equipment. Stock up on potions, collect precious gems, and gather gold to aid your journey.

Main Features:

  • Lead a roster of various unique characters, each with distinct abilities and weapons.

  • Manage your heroes’ stats to make them stronger.

  • Face dangerous events, circumstances, and quests.

  • Unravel the mystery surrounding the town of Westwall.

  • Engage in strategic, turn-based combat on a hex grid.

  • Experience dynamic battles where characters’ unique traits can unexpectedly shift the tide.

  • Immerse yourself in a rich, atmospheric dark fantasy world with six distinct environments.

  • Enjoy roguelike features, including permadeath, for high-stakes gameplay.

  • Explore procedurally generated maps for endless replayability.

  • Embrace traditional RPG elements like looting, inventory management, character leveling, stat upgrades, and customizable weapons and armor.

Ready yourself, adventurer, for the indomitable challenges that await.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
